global.description: The ad features a bold headline and promotional text with decorative elements.
global.main_message: Promoting new content with a clear price point.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Center decorative element
elements.description: A circular shape with a soft edge, positioned in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Center decorative element
elements.description: A rectangular shape with rounded corners, located in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Bottom left decorative element
elements.description: A small circular shape located towards the bottom left of the ad.

elements.label: Bottom right decorative element
elements.description: A small circular shape located towards the bottom right of the ad.

elements.label: Bottom center decorative element
elements.description: A small rectangular shape located towards the bottom center of the ad.

elements.label: Center decorative element
elements.description: A small rectangular shape positioned in the center of the ad.

elements.label: PulsePlay UGC
elements.description: Bold, large text reading 'PulsePlay UGC' at the top of the ad.

elements.label: New season announcement
elements.description: Medium-sized text stating 'A new season drops New hits every week' at the bottom of the ad.
elements.text_content: A new season drops New hits every week

elements.label: $4.99 price tag
elements.description: A prominent text displaying the price '$4.99' located at the bottom of the ad.
